Acidic Burst.description: As corrosive, extra acid damage on critical hit

Aquan.description: Extra benefits against creatures with fire subtype

Arcane Might.description: Sacrifice an Arcane spell slot and deal 1d4 extra damage .

Auran.description: Extra benefits against creatures with earth subtype

Bane.description: +2 enhancement bonus and +2d6 damage against one type of creature

Banishing.description: 3/day banish extraplanar creature back to its home plane. vs Will DC 20 or 24 if weapon is made from material overcoming DR.

Berserker.description: +1d8 damage while raging; two-handed weapons only

Binding.description: 2/day dimensional anchor on target for 10 minutes

Blessed.description: Cast Bless weapon on weapon 3/day. Can't have threaten enhancing abilities

Blindsighted.description: 3/day gain blindsight out to 30 ft. for 1 minute

Bloodfeeding.description: Stores blood points that can be released for extra damage

Bloodstone.description: Stores and empowers one vampiric touch spell

Blurstrike.description: 10/day first attack made in round treats target as flat-footed

Bodyfeeder.description: Cain temporary hp equal to half damage dealt by critical hits

Brash.description: Rage lasts for 3 additional rounds, immune to fear effects

Brilliant Energy.description: Sheds light, ignores armor bonuses to AC and nonliving matter

Brutal Surge.description: 1 + Con bonus times per day, +2 Bullrush to push opponent back furthest distant possible. 1+Con/day

Changeling.description: Change length and appearance of spear at will; spears, shortspears, and longspears only

Chargebreaker.description: Charging targets must succeed DC 14 Fort or knocked prone

Charging.description: +2d6 damage on charge attacks while mounted

Cursespewing.description: On critical hit, bestows -4 to struck enemy to attack, saves, skills, ability checks for 1 minute

Dancing.description: Fights on its own for 4 rounds, on command

Deadly Precision.description: +1d6 damage on sneak attack or sudden strike

Defensive Surge.description: 1 + Int bonus times per day, +2 to AC for one turn if using Combat Expertise or fighting defensively

Dessicating.description: +1d4 damage, +1d8 damage to plants and water elementals

Dessicating Burst.description: As desiccating, extra desiccating damage on critical hit

Disarming.description: +2 on disarm attempts, you cannot be disarmed

Dislocator.description: 3/day struck target teleported up to 10 ft.

Dislocator Great.description: 3/day struck target teleported up to 30 ft.

Dispelling.description: 3/day struck target subject to dispel magic

Dispelling Greater.description: 3/day struck target subject to greater dispel magic

Distance.description: This enchantment can only be placed on a ranged weapon. A weapon of distance doubles its range increment. Aura : Moderate divination

Divine Wrath.description: Expend turn undead gain 1d6 per Charisma bonus

Domineering.description: Struck target shaken for 1 minute Will DC 16

Doom Burst.description: On critical hit, target shaken for 5 rounds

Dragondoom.description: 3/day deliver smite attack against creature of dragon type

Dragonhunter.description: Extra damage based on size of creature 3/day.

Energy Aura.description: +ld6 damage of energy type of choice

Energy Surge.description: As prerequisite property, 1 + Con bonus times/day, +3d6 energy damage

Enervating.description: On critical hit, bestow one negative level on living target for 1 hour

Ethereal Reaver.description: As the ghost touch property, and continuous see invisibility

Everbright.description: 2/day blinding effect, weapon is immune to acid damage and rusting

Fiercebane.description: As bane, extra benefits against bane type or subtype

Flaming Burst.description: +ld6 fire damage, extra fire damage on critical hit

Fleshgrinding.description: Lodges in creature and deals normal damage for 5 rounds; piercing or slashing weapons only

Force.description: On a successful hit, a force weapon emits a powerful jolt of magical force. The magical force does not harm the weapon's wielder. Force weapons deal +1d6 points of force damage on a successful hit. If the weapon successfully hits a target protected by a force effect, such as a shield spell or bracers of armor , it might dispel the force effect in addition to damaging the target. Make a dispel check (1d20+10) against the effect (DC 11 + caster level). If the check succeeds, the force effect is dispelled (if a spell) or suppressed (if a magic item). Ranged weapons bestow this property on their ammunition. Incorporeal creatures get no miss chance against force weapons.

Ghost Strike.description: As ghost touch, can deal sneak attacks and critical hits to undead

Ghost Touch.description: Deals damage normally to/can be used by incorporeal creatures

Heavenly Burst.description: On critical hit, +3d6 damage and blinding effect to evil creatures

Hideaway.description: Collapses to two size categories smaller, easy to conceal

Holy Surge.description: As holy, 1 + Cha bonus times per day, +3d6 damage to evil target

Hunting.description: +4 on weapon damage rolls against favored enemies

Icy Burst.description: +ld6 cold damage, extra cold damage on critical hit

Ignan.description: Extra benefits against creatures with water subtype

Illuminating.description: Bright illumination to 20 ft., shadowy illumination to 40 ft.

Illusion Bane.description: 1/day destroy illusions, ignore miss chance from illusion effects

Impact.description: Double threat range, bludgeoning weapons only

Impaling.description: 3/day treat next attack before end of turn as touch attack, piercing weapons only

Impedance.description: Impedes struck target's ability to create spell effects

Incorporeal Binding.description: As ghost touch, incorporeal target loses some incorporeal traits for 1 round

Keen.description: Double threat range, piercing or slashing weapons only

Ki Focus.description: Use ki attacks as if unarmed

Magebane.description: Extra benefits against arcane spellcasters, invokers

Maiming.description: On critical hit, deal extra damage based on critical multiplier

Manifester.description: 1/day draw 5 power points from weapon when manifesting power

Merciful.description: +1d6 damage, all damage is nonlethal on command

Metalline.description: Change composition to adamantine, silver, cold iron, or steel

Mighty Cleaving.description: One additional cleave attempt per round if you have Cleave feat

Mighty Smiting.description: +2 on smite's attack roll and damage roll, one extra smite per day

Mindcrusher.description: Struck psionic target loses power points, nonpsionic target takes Wis damage

Mindfeeder.description: Cain 1 temporary power point per 5 points of critical hit damage dealt

Morphing.description: Can become any melee or thrown weapon of same size and type

Necrotic Focus.description: Deal ability drain and bestow negative levels as with natural weapons

Paralytic Burst.description: On critical hit, target paralyzed for 1 round

Paralyzing.description: 1/day target paralyzed for up to 10 rounds

Power Storing.description: Stores single targeted power of up to 5 power points

Precise.description: This property can only be placed on a ranged weapon. A precise weapon can be shot or thrown at an opponent engaged in melee without suffering the standard -4 penalty (as the Precise Shot feat). This doesn't grant any special power to those who already have the Precise Shot feat.

Prismatic Burst.description: On critical hit, target subject to prismatic spray

Profane.description: +1d6 damage to living creatures, various evil-themed abilities

Profane Burst.description: As profane, on critical hit, extra negative energy and Con damage

Psychic.description: Gains enhancement bonus based on power point reserve

Psychokinetic Burst.description: As psychokinetic, extra force damage on critical hit

Quick Loading.description: This property may only be placed on a crossbow. A quick-loading crossbow accesses an extradimensional space that can hold up to 100 bolts, allowing the wielder to reload the crossbow more rapidly than normal. Reloading a quick-loading hand or light crossbow is a free action (allowing a character with multiple attacks to use his full attack rate), while reloading a quick-loading heavy crossbow is a move-equivalent action. Adding or removing a bolt by hand from the extradimensional space requires a move-equivalent action. Different types of bolts can be held in the extradimensional space, and the wielder may select freely from these when reloading the crossbow.

Resounding.description: On successful attack, allies gain +1 morale bonus on attacks and against fear for 1 round

Returning.description: This enchantment can only be placed on a weapon that can be thrown. A returning weapon returns through the air back to the creature that threw it. It returns on the round following the round that it was thrown just before its throwing creature's turn. It is therefore ready to use again that turn. Aura : Moderate transmutation

Revealing.description: Struck target subject to faerie fire

Sacred.description: +1d6 damage to undead or +2d6 to evil outsider, good-aligned for overcoming DR

Sacred Burst.description: As sacred, extra positive energy and Cha damage on critical hit

Screaming Burst.description: As screaming, extra sonic damage on critical hit

Seeking.description: Only ranged weapons can have the seeking ability. The weapon veers toward the target, negating any miss chances that would apply because of concealment. (The wielder still has to aim the weapon at the target. Arrows mistakenly shot into an empty space, for example, do not veer and hit invisible enemies, even if they are nearby.) Aura : Strong divination

Shadowstrike.description: 1/day add 5 ft. to reach and deny target Dex bonus to AC

Shattermantle.description: Struck target's spell resistance reduced by 2 for 1 round

Shielding.description: Transforms into heavy steel shield on command, light weapons only

Shocking Burst.description: +ld6 electricity damage, extra electricity damage on critical hit

Slow Burst.description: On critical hit, target slowed for 3 rounds

Soulbound.description: Stores up to 2 points of essentia for enhancement bonuses

Soulbound Greater.description: Stores up to 4 points of essentia for enhancement bonuses

Soulbreaker.description: As enervating, negative levels from enervating property might be permanent

Souldrinking.description: As enervating, on critical hit gain 5 temporary hp, +2 on melee damage rolls

Spell Storing.description: Store single targeted spell of up to 3rd level

Spellstrike.description: Transfer enhancement bonus to saves against spells or spell-like abilities

Stunning.description: As screaming, struck target stunned for 1 round on critical hit

Stunning Surge.description: +1 Cha bonus times per day, target stunned for 1 round

Stygian.description: 3/day next attack bestows negative level on target for 10 minutes

Sundering.description: Attack as Improved Sunder, +1d6 damage on sunder attacks

Sweeping.description: +2 on Strength checks to trip an opponent with the weapon

Terran.description: Extra benefits against creatures with air subtype

Throwing.description: Range increment of 10 ft., can be thrown

Thundering.description: Deals sonic damage, deafens on critical hit

Transmuting.description: Transforms to overcome target's damage reduction

Unholy Surge.description: As unholy, 1 + Cha bonus times per day, +3d6 damage to good target

Vampiric.description: +ld6 damage to living creatures, healed of amount equal to extra damage

Vanishing.description: 1/day after attack, transport self and gear up to 60 ft. as dimension door

Venomous.description: 3/day coat weapon in poison dealing 1d4 initial and secondary Str damage

Vicious.description: +2d6 damage, 1d6 damage to you on every attack

Vorpal.description: Sever foe's head on critical hit; slashing weapons only

Weakening.description: On critical hit, target takes - 4 to its Strength

Whirling.description: 3/day strike all adjacent opponents as Whirlwind Attack
